home.title1: You Were Written Five Thousand Years Ago
home.subtitle: Bazi charts your destiny and fortune cycles, Plum Blossom divines gains and losses, Liu Yao reveals how events unfold, Qimen Dunjia reads timing and direction — five millennia of metaphysical wisdom, retold in language you understand.
home.guideBanner: We recommend {saveLink} first so it auto-fills during readings. You can add multiple profiles for family and friends anytime.
home.feature1Desc: Covers Bazi, Plum Blossom, Liu Yao divination, Qimen Dunjia and more. Algorithms run locally with transparent, traceable charting.
home.feature2Desc: Translates classical metaphysical terminology into modern language, offering targeted analysis based on chart structure — not generic fluff.
home.feature3Desc: Chart data computed locally in real time. Results stream as cards — no waiting, view and share instantly.
home.feature4Desc: Save multiple birth profiles for yourself, family, and friends. Switch with one click. All data stays local.
home.toolBaziDesc: Best for understanding your overall life pattern, personality, and fortune cycles. Decodes your chart structure, useful elements, and decade-long cycles.
home.toolZhouyiDesc: Best for quick divination that balances context, process, and outcome. Ask about career, love, or wealth. Reads the hexagram to reveal the full picture.
home.toolZwdsDesc: Best for a detailed look at every area of life. Each of the twelve palaces holds key stars. Interprets your opportunities in career, love, and wealth.
home.toolLiuyaoDesc: Built for FIFA 2026 World Cup. Pick a matchup, cast six coins, and divine the outcome from line strength and moving-line interactions.
home.toolQimenWorldcupDesc: Select a 2026 World Cup match, predict the outcome with Qimen Dunjia, and see win probability
home.toolLiurenDesc: Best for detailed analysis of how specific matters unfold and end. One question at a time. Uses the Four Pillars and Three Transmissions to read fortune and misfortune, revealing the full story and final outcome.
home.toolLiurenWorldcupDesc: Select a 2026 World Cup match, predict the outcome with Da Liu Ren four-pillar three-transmission divination
home.toolLiuyaoDivinationDesc: Best for "can I, will it, should I" questions. One question at a time. Reads self-response strength and moving lines to reveal how events unfold.
home.toolVedicDesc: Best for seeing yourself through an Indian astrological lens. Reads your personality, career, wealth, and yearly outlook — a fresh perspective.
home.toolQimenDesc: Best for timing, strategy, and reading the situation. Career moves, investments, travel — Interprets auspicious directions and optimal windows to act.
home.toolHuangdaoDesc: Best for picking the right date for important events like moving, weddings, or business launches. Combines your birth profile with the traditional almanac to find the most favorable timing.
home.faq1Q: What online divination tools does ososn offer, and which should I use?
home.faq1A: We offer Four Pillars (Bazi), Plum Blossom, Liu Yao divination, Qimen Dunjia and more. Bazi reveals your life pattern and decade-long fortune cycles. Plum Blossom answers one specific question at a time. Liu Yao excels at judging how events unfold and their final outcomes. Qimen Dunjia reads timing, direction, and strategic choices. Each system draws from classical texts and can be used complementarily.
home.faq2Q: What information do I need for online charting?
home.faq2A: Four Pillars and Qimen Dunjia require an accurate birth date, time, and location for precise charting. Plum Blossom and Liu Yao do not require birth data — just focus on your question. We recommend saving your birth profile first so it auto-fills during readings, eliminating repetitive entry and reducing input errors.
home.faq3Q: How accurate is the chart data?
home.faq3A: All charts are computed locally using deterministic algorithms: Bazi follows standard stem-branch and solar term rules; Plum Blossom adheres to the original classical text; Liu Yao uses the three-coin casting method from traditional texts; Qimen Dunjia follows classical palace arrangement methods. Interpretations are based on chart structure from multiple angles. Core chart data (stems, branches, stars, hexagrams, palaces) is fixed and unchanging.
home.faq4Q: What if I don't know my birth hour?
home.faq4A: Four Pillars requires an accurate birth hour to determine the Hour Pillar. If unknown, you can still view partial information using year, month, and day only, or try Plum Blossom or Liu Yao — these tools don't depend on birth data. For Qimen Dunjia asking about current matters, you can also use the present time to cast a chart.
home.faq5Q: What's the difference between Bazi and Liu Yao?
home.faq5A: Bazi is destiny analysis — it reveals your innate pattern and fortune cycles from birth time, answering 'What kind of person am I and how is my fortune?' Liu Yao is divination — it answers specific questions through coin casting, such as 'Will this succeed and what is the outcome?' They complement each other: Bazi sees long-term trends and personality; Liu Yao judges specific matters and timing.
home.faq6A: All profile data is stored only in your browser's localStorage and never uploaded to any server. Chart calculations happen entirely on your device. During interpretation, only structured chart data (e.g., stems, branches, hexagram patterns, palace information) is transmitted — no personally identifiable information like your name. You can delete all data anytime in Settings.
home.faq7Q: Are these online divination tools free?
home.faq7A: Yes, all online charting and interpretation tools on ososn are completely free to use. There are no paywalls and no usage limits. You can perform unlimited readings for yourself, family, and friends anytime, with all features equally available.
home.liuNianText: {name}'s {year} fortune: Bazi reveals annual trends, Ziwei shows decade patterns. Select a tool above to start.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.subtitle: Terms
terms.section1Content: ososn is an online divination tool based on traditional Chinese metaphysics (Four Pillars Bazi, Zhouyi I Ching, etc.), combining classical numerology algorithms with modern interpretation technology. This service is for cultural entertainment and self-awareness reference only and does not constitute any professional advice.
terms.section2Content1: All divination results provided by this website (including but not limited to Bazi charts, chart interpretations, and hexagram analysis) are for cultural entertainment reference only and do not constitute medical, psychological, legal, financial, or any other professional advice. Users should exercise their own judgment and bear all consequences of using this service.
terms.section2Content2: This website assumes no liability for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use this service.
terms.section3Content: User profile data is stored only in the browser's localStorage and is not uploaded to our servers. Users can delete all data at any time on the Settings page.
terms.section4Content: The code, design, and algorithm implementations of this website belong to ososn. Users may not copy, modify, or use them for commercial purposes without authorization.
terms.section5Content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Revised terms will be posted on this page, and continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.
terms.seoTitle: Terms of Use & Disclaimer - ososn Divination Platform
terms.seoDesc: ososn Terms of Use and Disclaimer. This service is for cultural entertainment reference only and does not constitute any professional advice.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Privacy
privacy.section1Content: ososn uses a pure client-side architecture. All your personal data (including birth information and profile names) is stored only in your browser's localStorage. We do not upload this data to any server and cannot access it on your device.
privacy.section2Content: When you use the interpretation feature, your chart information (stems, branches, ten gods, fortune cycles, etc.) is forwarded to the interpretation service provider through our server proxy. We do not persistently store this information on our servers; we only act as a real-time request relay.
privacy.section3Content: We do not use any third-party tracking cookies. If you have configured analytics tools such as Baidu Analytics, data collection follows the privacy policy of the corresponding service provider.
privacy.section4Content: You can delete individual profiles at any time on the 'My Profiles' page, or clear your browser's localStorage to delete all data. We cannot delete data stored on your local device on your behalf.
privacy.section5Content: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us through the channels provided on the website.
privacy.seoDesc: ososn Privacy Policy. User data is stored only in the local browser. Interpretation requests only transmit chart data without personally identifiable information.

fortuneRadar.title: Five-Dimensional Fortune Analysis
fortuneRadar.subtitle: Comprehensive scoring and interpretation of each dimension

relationship.high: Strong romantic fortune; likely to meet a suitable partner. Good time for social activities and expanding your circle.
relationship.mid: Steady romantic development. Requires careful cultivation; patience is key for lasting relationships.
relationship.low: Weaker romantic fortune. Focus on self-improvement first and wait for the right opportunity.

career.high: Strong career momentum with贵人 support. Excellent time to push for advancement and breakthroughs.
career.mid: Steady career progress. Build experience and credentials steadily for long-term success.
career.low: Career obstacles present. Stay low-profile, avoid major changes, and wait for better timing.

wealth.high: Strong financial inflow. Both正财 and偏财 opportunities; consider investments but know when to stop.
wealth.mid: Stable finances. Conservative approach recommended; focus on steady income over risky ventures.
wealth.low: Weak financial fortune. Practice frugality and avoid large expenditures or high-risk investments.

health.high: Excellent physical condition with abundant energy. Maintain regular habits to preserve this state.
health.mid: Stable health. Balance work and rest; watch for seasonal illnesses.
health.low: Weaker health fortune. Take care of body and mind; avoid overwork and late nights.

study.high: Excellent study fortune with quick absorption. Great time for advanced studies and certifications.
study.mid: Steady academic progress. Consistency and planning are key to results.
study.low: Academic obstacles. Consider adjusting your learning methods or seeking guidance.

championOdds.title: World Cup 2026 Champion Odds
championOdds.subtitle: Opta Supercomputer × Liuyao Divination dual-track prediction. Data-driven probability on the left, Eastern metaphysical fate reading on the right — two forms of wisdom, one World Cup.
championOdds.methodNote: Using the self-line as the team's destiny, the official-spirit as the honor/championship, and the parent-line as the foundation. All 48 teams were divined before the tournament.

link.championOddsDesc: Opta × Liuyao dual-track odds for 48 teams

readings.ESP: The self-line rests strong on the day branch, the official-spirit moves forward into advancement — championship destiny is at its peak.
readings.FRA: The official-spirit receives strength from the monthly branch, the self-line joins the day stem — the title moment must not be missed.
readings.ENG: The self-line is strong yet the official-spirit remains hidden, awaiting its emergence — late momentum is promising.
readings.ARG: The self-line rests in the Azure Dragon's ground, the official-spirit holds the self and receives returning life — the aura of a title defense.
readings.POR: The self-line gains strength from the day, the official-spirit moves secretly — title hunger burns but strong rivals loom.
readings.BRA: The self-line emerges powerfully from emptiness, the official-spirit awaits clash after combination — key battles will decide all.
readings.GER: The parent-line is strong with deep foundation, the official-spirit restrained but ready to rise — steady and methodical progress.
readings.NED: The self-line is neutral, the official-spirit weak — advancement is possible but championship destiny falls short.
readings.NOR: The self-line meets monthly breakage, the spirit is restricted — dark-horse potential but the summit remains unreachable.
readings.BEL: The self-line has roots but the official-spirit lies in the tomb — the golden generation's afterglow cannot light the trophy.
readings.COL: The self-line transforms into receiving restriction, the official-spirit is empty — this South American force has ordinary fortune.
readings.MAR: The self-line rests in the Vermilion Bird's proper place, the official-spirit sits on the monthly stem — Africa's star may bring surprises.
readings.SUI: The self-line is quiet, the official-spirit does not appear — defense is their strength but the title is elusive.
readings.URU: The self-line meets clash, the official-spirit is hidden — this aging force cannot reclaim past glory.
readings.ECU: The self-line is restricted by month and clashed by day, the spirit is weak — the highland warriors' fortune is low.
readings.JPN: The self-line gains energy from the day branch, but the official-spirit is restricted — the round of 16 is the ceiling.
readings.CRO: The self-line is weak yet receives life, the official-spirit is empty — the checkered legion has courage but cannot reach the peak.
readings.USA: The self-line gains host advantage but the official-spirit is restricted — the home benefit stops at the quarterfinals.
readings.TUR: The self-line is broken by month and restricted by day, the spirit enters the tomb — the crescent army's fortune is poor.
readings.MEX: The self-line is strong but the official-spirit chants in hiding — as a host, advancing is expected but the title is out of reach.
readings.SEN: The self-line is weak without roots, the official-spirit is clashed — the Lions of Teranga face dim destiny.
readings.AUT: The self-line enters the tomb, the spirit is empty — the Alpine nation cannot create miracles.
readings.PAR: The self-line is restricted, the official-spirit transforms into retreat — this traditional force faces more danger than fortune.
readings.SWE: The self-line meets emptiness, the official-spirit is restricted by the monthly stem — the Nordic force cannot break through.
readings.KOR: The self-line is clashed by day and restricted by month, the spirit is weak — the Taeguk Warriors have no title hope.
readings.CAN: The self-line rests in the Azure Dragon with energy, but the official-spirit is restricted — escaping the group is already victory.
readings.AUS: The self-line is weak, the official-spirit enters the tomb — the Socceroos' fortune is at its lowest ebb.
readings.EGY: The self-line transforms into receiving restriction, the spirit meets clash — the Pharaohs will struggle past the group stage.
readings.BIH: The self-line is broken by month, restricted by day, and meets emptiness — the official-spirit is extinct, advancing would be a miracle.
readings.IRN: The self-line is weak and enters the tomb, the official-spirit is restricted — the Persian cavalry cannot break their fate.
readings.ALG: The self-line rests in the White Tiger and is restricted, the spirit is empty — the Desert Foxes' fortune is extremely poor.
readings.CZE: The self-line gains from the day but the official-spirit remains hidden — the Eastern European force cannot regain former glory.
readings.CIV: The self-line is weak and without energy, the official-spirit transforms into ghost — the Elephants' path is arduous.
readings.GHA: The self-line is broken by day and restricted by month, the spirit enters the tomb — the Black Stars cannot escape the group.
readings.SCO: The self-line is quiet and restricted, the official-spirit does not appear — the Tartan Army cannot play the victory song.
readings.PAN: The self-line meets emptiness and enters the tomb, the official-spirit is at extinction — destined to be mere participants.
readings.RSA: The self-line is broken by month and restricted by day, the spirit transforms into retreat — South Africa's journey holds more danger.
readings.TUN: The self-line is weak and restricted, the official-spirit is hidden — the Carthage Eagles cannot spread their wings.
readings.QAT: The self-line is weak and meets emptiness, the official-spirit is clashed — Qatar cannot escape group-stage misfortune.
readings.IRQ: The self-line enters the tomb and meets daily breakage, the spirit is empty — Mesopotamia cannot produce miracles.
readings.JOR: The self-line rests in the White Tiger and is restricted, the official-spirit transforms into retreat — no upset this time.
readings.COD: The self-line is broken by month and enters the tomb, the official-spirit is clashed — a participant's fate is sealed.
readings.UZB: The self-line is weak without roots, the official-spirit chants in hiding — the Central Asian wolves cannot break through.
readings.KSA: The self-line is clashed by day and restricted by month, the spirit enters the tomb — the Green Falcons cannot recreate miracles.
readings.NZL: The self-line meets emptiness and is restricted, the official-spirit is at extinction — Oceania's sole hope faces doom.
readings.CPV: The self-line is weak and enters the tomb, the official-spirit transforms into ghost — the Blue Sharks' debut holds danger.
readings.HAI: The self-line is broken by day and restricted by month, the spirit is empty — Haiti's magic cannot continue.
readings.CUW: The self-line rests at the extreme of extinction, the official-spirit is hidden — debut and endpoint are one.
